title: Immersive Armor HUD
description: Adds information about your armor's durability to the hotbar in a vanilla friendly way.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e1ae6164f6b5bd65d6f6243017404eec9ee2412_0.webp)

Immersive Armor HUD adds information to the HUD about what types of armor you're currently wearing, above the existing armor strength bar, with durability information showing which armors are about to break.

Immersive Armor HUD renders armor information using custom miniaturized 7x7 armor icons, designed to be pixel-perfect and align with the vanilla bars:

![demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db4ccf7ca618f0a7c1a15b25c169ca942daa3d1c.png)

The position and offset of the armor HUD bar is configurable--you can switch it to the right side, or adjust the X and Y position manually.

The mod also provides mod compat for various mods, currently only supporting armors from The Aether:

![mod compat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c988e6a1a2d27b84de98f718921bd230cd08f7f1.png)
